title: Expired Sugar
lyricSeed:
Candy from a decade dead still tastes so sweet
Stale bubblegum melting pink between my teeth
Chalky little hearts with faded words to read
Eat the past until my stomach glitches out
Sugar-rush neon in my rotting little mouth
Never let it go, never let it go
